name: ils-terminal-root
description: ИЛС угольно-нефтяного терминала — полный локальный запуск

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd .. && cd frontend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.install:clean: npm run clean:deps && npm run install:all
scripts.clean:deps: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');for (const d of ['node_modules','backend/node_modules','frontend/node_modules']) { fs.rmSync(p.join(process.cwd(),d), {recursive:true, force:true}); }"
scripts.db:init: npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend && npm run prisma:push --prefix backend
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:init && npm run db:seed
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
scripts.prepare:portable: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup && npm run build:portable
scripts.run:server: cross-env SERVE_FRONTEND=1 npm run dev --prefix backend
scripts.dev:frontend: cross-env VITE_DEMO_MODE=false VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3001/api VITE_BASE_PATH=/ npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
